case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. LEXINGTON NATIONAL INSURANCE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LEXINGTON NATIONAL INSURANCE CORPORATION
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LEXINGTON NATIONAL INSURANCE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEXINGTON NATIONAL INSURANCE CORPORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
